phase1.title: Collapse Panel
phase1.content: Hide the panel to make room for the server list

phase2.title: Expand Panel
phase2.content: Tap again to bring back the connect button

phase3.title: Feedback
phase3.content: Having issues? Let us know anytime

phase4.title: Invite Friends
phase4.content: Both you and your friend get free time

phase5.title: Share Link
phase5.content: Send your invite link to a friend

phase6.title: Get Started
phase6.content: Head back and pick a server to connect
